what_they_reward.title: Algorithmic Efficiency
what_they_reward.whyValued: Google deals with massive scale data
what_they_reward.examplePhrase: Using a hash map here reduces complexity to O(n)...

what_they_reward.title: System Design Capability
what_they_reward.howToShow: Talk about load balancing and databases
what_they_reward.examplePhrase: I would design this using a distributed approach...

what_gets_rejected.title: Poor Communication
what_gets_rejected.whatItLooksLike: Jumping into code without discussing trade-offs
what_gets_rejected.neverSay: I'll just start writing the code.

google-software engineer.cultural_notes: Google values 'Googliness', which includes collaborating well, being comfortable with ambiguity, and having high technical standards.
google-software engineer.first_question: Tell me about a challenging project you worked on and the technical decisions you made.
google-software engineer.hiring_process: Application -> Recruiter Screen -> Technical Screen -> 3-4 Onsite Interviews -> Hiring Committee Review -> Offer
